title: rubus godronii var. pseudobifrons
intro: Rubus godronii var. pseudobifrons, also known as the pseudobifrons raspberry or a variety of the Raspberry (Rubus godronii), is a plant species in the rose family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus godronii var. pseudobifrons include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
